summary: UnifiedRelationVisitor walks the relational AST, composes with UnifiedExpressionVisitor for embedded expressions. Now uses RelationVisitRegistry for extensible dispatch (supports PipelineStepRelNode). Accepts optional ref_resolver kwarg for DAG support.
extension_points: RelationVisitRegistry allows external node types (e.g. PipelineStepRelNode) to register visit handlers without modifying the visitor itself
lifecycle_notes: 2026-05: Added RelationVisitRegistry for extensible node dispatch, _core_handlers.py for handler registration

evidence.detail: Core handler registration including pipeline node support
